steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify LE015 package contents. Includes 1 pair of wall-mounting posts, padlocks with keys, and self-tapping installation screws.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify LE015 package contents. Includes 1 pair of wall-mounting posts, padlocks with keys, and self-tapping installation screws.

steps.title: Align on Wall Studs
steps.content: Locate steel frame studs in enclosed trailer wall. Position posts vertically, spacing them exactly 36 3/4" apart (center-to-center).

es.title: Align on Wall Studs
es.content: Locate steel frame studs in enclosed trailer wall. Position posts vertically, spacing them exactly 36 3/4" apart (center-to-center).

steps.title: Drill and Secure
steps.content: Use self-tapping screws to secure post base plates directly through trailer wall plywood and into steel framing ribs.

es.title: Drill and Secure
es.content: Use self-tapping screws to secure post base plates directly through trailer wall plywood and into steel framing ribs.

steps.title: Secure Trimmers
steps.content: Place trimmers in hooks, close locking clips, and secure with Master Lock padlocks.

es.title: Secure Trimmers
es.content: Place trimmers in hooks, close locking clips, and secure with Master Lock padlocks.
